titleStmt.title: SII 25.55: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 55. (A.R. No. 55 of 1908.) VAḺUVŪR, WANDIWASH TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: East wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Brahmapurīśvara temple.
This epigraph is in characters of thirteenth century.

It records the gift of 22(1/2) kāśu by the śivabrāhmaṇas (names mentioned) of the temple who obtained from Āṇḍār, Poṉṉambalak-kūttar, a devotee of Vaḻugūr for maintaining 4(1/2) sandhi lamps in the temple of Āḷuḍaiyār Tiruvayanīśvaram-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār of Vaḻuvūr in Irumbēḍu-nāḍu in Veṇkuṉṟak-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḷa-maṇḍalam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tribhuvaṉac cakravattikaḷ śrī rājarājadevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 3āvatu jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻa maṇṭalattu
veṇkuṉṟak koṭṭattu Irumpeṭu nāṭṭu vaḻukūr Āḷuṭaiyār tiruvayaniśvaramuṭaiyaṉāyaṉāṟku Ivvūril
kumpiṭṭirukkum Āṇṭār poṉṉamvalakkūttar pakkal Iṉṉāyaṉārkoyil śivabrāhmaṇaril kāk
ku nāyakaṉ paṭṭaṉāṉa nāṟpat teṇṇāyirabhaṭṭaṉ kaikkoṇṭa paḻaṅkācu 5 Aiñcukku Erikkuñ canti
viḷakku 1 Oṉṟum tirukkāḷatti bhaṭṭaṉ peruntirukkoyi luṭaiyāṉu mavan tampi tiruvekampa
muṭaiyāṉum kaikkoṇṭa paḻaṅkācu 5 Aiñcukku Erikkuñ cantiviḷakku 1 Oṉṟum Āka viḷak
ku Iraṇṭum candrādityavarai Erikkakkaṭavomil muvom kākku nāyakapaṭṭaṉ tiru
vekampam Uṭaiyāṉ mātevappaṭṭaṉ kaikkoṇṭa paḻaṅkācu 10
pattukku Erikkum cantiviḷakku 2 Iraṇṭum viṉāyakapaṭṭaṉ Uṭaiya pi
ḷḷai makaṉ viṉāyakaṉum Ivaṉ tampi karuṇākaraṉum kaikkoṇṭa paḻa
ṅkācu 2(1/2) Iraṇṭe Araikkum Erikkum cantiviḷakku (1/2) Araiyum Āka vi
ḷakku 2(1/2)yum cantirātitavarai Erikka kaṭavom yimmuvom Ivviḷakku 4(1/2)
yum Ivvūr niyāya karil Āṇṭār poṉṉampala kūttar tanmam .
Digital edition of SII 25.55 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
